name: Daily stock market report with Twelve Data API sent via WhatsApp and email

nodes.name: Fetch Stock Data from Twelve Data

parameters.content: Triggers daily at 5:00 PM (after market close) Monday-Friday.
Sets API key, stock symbols, and alert recipients.
Fetches stock data for selected symbols via Twelve Data API.
Processes stock data to identify top gainers and losers.
Sends formatted alerts via WhatsApp and Email.

main.node: Fetch Stock Data from Twelve Data
